card.title: About Salma Biryani
card.description:
Best-Selling Dishes at Salma Biryani

Salma Biryani is a popular food destination in Balaji Nagar Masjid Center, Nellore, known for serving delicious indian food. Customers can order from Salma Biryani for fresh preparation, satisfying portions, and flavorful dishes.

Gobi Fried Rice

Gobi Fried Rice is one of the popular dishes at Salma Biryani. It is prepared with quality ingredients and offers a satisfying taste for customers ordering from Balaji Nagar Masjid Center.

Veg Manchuriann

Veg Manchuriann is another preferred item from the menu. It is a good choice for customers looking to enjoy tasty indian food in Nellore.

Why Customers Love Ordering from Salma Biryani

Customers prefer Salma Biryani for its tasty food, reliable service, quick preparation, and menu choices. The restaurant serves indian dishes along with options such as soft drinks, making it suitable for different food preferences.

Enjoy Food from Salma Biryani at Home with Swiggy

Swiggy makes it easy to order food from Salma Biryani in Nellore. Customers can browse the menu, choose their favorite dishes, place an order online, make secure payments, track the order live, and enjoy doorstep delivery from Salma Biryani in Balaji Nagar Masjid Center.

Discover More Restaurants in Balaji Nagar Masjid Center

Balaji Nagar Masjid Center has many restaurants offering different cuisines, snacks, meals, desserts, and beverages. Customers exploring food delivery in Nellore can discover more restaurants and order their favorite food online through Swiggy.
